11 active · as of 2026-03-28
J

Triage suggestion — 11 active, 3 actually need you today

Of 11 active alerts: alert-2026-001 (Aurora overrun), alert-2026-002 (Aldira AED 800K), alert-2026-010 (permit expiry — Bvlgari Marina) need action by EOD. The remaining 8 are watch-list items. Don't let alert fatigue obscure that hierarchy.

— Jeeves

The Umbrella Inc. dispute spans 3 alerts, an invoice, two projects, and a staff escalation. View it as a single case file with timeline + suggested actions.

Active Alerts

Ordered by severity
error

Aurora Gala 2026 — projected overrun +22% critical

Cost-to-date AED 1.62M against AED 1.9M budget at ~60% timeline progress. LED dome scope doubled mid-build (Change Order #1, AED 110K disputed by client). Forecast final cost AED 2.32M; client billable scope unchanged → projected loss AED 990K unless change order accepted.

Suggested: Halt further fabrication; force-resolve Change Order #1 in writing before next vendor PO.

Rule: rule-project-overrun-15 · Triggered: 2026-03-15 · Owners: cfo, founder-md, prod-senior

#alert-2026-001
warning

Aldira Group invoice AED 800K — 36 days overdue high

Solstice Souk 2025 final tranche. Aldira finance unresponsive since 2026-02-15. Account flagged 'watchlist'. CFO escalated to founder-md.

Suggested: Send formal demand letter (template T-3); pause new business with Aldira pending settlement.

Rule: rule-invoice-overdue-30 · Triggered: 2026-03-22 · Owners: cfo, founder-md, head-acc

#alert-2026-002
warning

Aurora Gala Change Order #1 — disputed > 14 days high

USD 110K (AED 404K) change order rejected by Vision Realm KSA. Client claims verbal scope only. No signed change order. Linked to alert-2026-001.

Rule: rule-disputed-invoice · Triggered: 2026-03-18 · Owners: cfo, founder-md, head-acc

#alert-2026-003
warning

Lloyds insurance dispute — Ancient Moon 2024 — long-running high long-tail

Outstanding contingent receivable AED 1.31M. Last carrier response 2026-01-18 (declined arbitration). Counsel recommends civil suit; cost-benefit analysis pending.

Rule: rule-disputed-invoice · Triggered: 2024-11-04 · 510 days old · Owners: cfo, founder-md

#alert-2026-009
warning

Family K. engagement — Bvlgari Marina noise permit expires 2026-04-04 high

Renewal application not yet submitted. 7-day permit lead time. Bookings flagged.

Rule: rule-permit-expiry · Triggered: 2026-03-27 · Owners: bookings, founder-cd

#alert-2026-010
error_outline

Umbrella Inc. Invoice #329 — partial paid, 5 days overdue medium

AED 6,040 outstanding. Quality-control dispute over 'spiritual energy alignment' deliverable. Client demands re-inspection. Producer Sheleesh Quereshi unreachable.

Rule: rule-disputed-invoice · Triggered: 2026-03-23 · Owners: head-prod, cfo

#alert-2026-004
error_outline

Bluewaters AR Walk — burn rate +12% vs plan medium

Software vendor delay on AR engine pushed crew time by 10 days. Margin compression risk if delay extends past 2026-04-10.

Rule: rule-project-burn-vs-progress · Triggered: 2026-03-19 · Owners: head-prod, head-acc

#alert-2026-005
error_outline

Open USD AR exposure: USD 360K medium

Vision Realm KSA + Royal Office Qatar combined open AR. Hedging not in place. AED-USD peg holds, but invoicing in USD with AED-denominated COGS creates reporting noise.

Rule: rule-fx-exposure · Triggered: 2026-03-12 · Owners: cfo

#alert-2026-006
error_outline

Meraas Bluewaters Milestone 2 — due tomorrow medium watch

AED 690K. Meraas historically pays on time, no escalation needed yet — informational.

Rule: rule-invoice-overdue-7 · Triggered: 2026-03-20 · Owners: head-acc

#alert-2026-011
info

Restricted cash 38% of total — within tolerance, monitor low

Lantern Bay escrow holding AED 5.64M. Sweep to operating after vendor settlement 2026-04-15.

Rule: rule-escrow-mix · Triggered: 2026-03-16 · Owners: cfo

#alert-2026-007
info

Permits Plus DXB — paid 4 days late on PRM-2026-0019 low

Pattern: 3rd late payment to this preferred vendor in 90 days. Risk of reduced priority on next-event permit run.

Rule: rule-vendor-paid-late · Triggered: 2026-03-25 · Owners: cfo

Delivery Channels

Where alerts go
ChannelEnabledRouting / threshold
mail Email On real-time-critical, daily-digest-rest
forum Slack On Workspace: thecrisistheater.slack.com · critical → #alerts-fire · high → #alerts-finance
sms SMS On Threshold: critical · to: cfo, founder-md
dashboard Dashboard On Badge from: medium, high, critical
bedtime Quiet hours On 22:00–07:00 Asia/Dubai · exceptions: critical
tune Configure rules & channels in Settings

Case file · Umbrella Inc.

Disputed account · 12 weeks open · cross-system view
Outstanding (Phase 1)
108K
disputed · 12 weeks open
Phase 2 frozen
620K
Frozen pending resolution of Phase 1 dispute. C...
Staff still loaded
~22K/wk
Sheleesh Quereshi · 60% allocated
Credit limit
400K
Status: watchlist
What each system says about this client
  • HubSpot Contract signed 2024-10-22 · AED 480K · "Atrium special project, 1 phase + option"
  • Asana Project p-2024-012 stalled at 78% · last activity 2026-02-04 · ticket QC-211 unresolved
  • Zoho Books Phase 1 billed across 3 invoices · received AED 372K of AED 480K · final extras invoice TCT-2026-329 (AED 12K, "Special Services") still outstanding
  • Bayzat Sheleesh Quereshi timesheet still allocating 24h/wk to umbrella-* tags
  • ENBD Last receipt from Umbrella: 2026-02-12 (AED 180K partial)

Timeline

2024-10-22 · HubSpot
Contract signed — AED 480K
Sheleesh closes the deal personally. Net 30 terms. No retention clause negotiated.
2024-12-02 · Asana
Phase 1 kickoff
Atrium installation begins. Umbrella facilities team adds last-minute change requests not in scope.
2025-03-01 · Asana
Substantial completion · QC inspection raises 4 findings
Umbrella's QC inspector flags lighting calibration and finish quality. Sheleesh disputes findings as opinion-based, no remediation agreed.
2025-05-14 · Zoho
Phase 1 invoiced in full · AED 480K
Three invoices over April–May for build, install, and special services. Net 30 across all three.
2025-08-30 · Bank
Partial payment received · AED 192K
"Provisional payment subject to QC remediation" per Umbrella memo. Covers main install invoices.
2026-02-12 · Bank
Second partial · AED 180K
Brings total to AED 372K. AED 108K still disputed — including the small TCT-2026-329 extras invoice (AED 12K, "Special Services").
2026-02-15 · Email log
Sheleesh's escalation email goes unanswered
Subject: "Final settlement — Atrium Phase 1." 9 follow-ups since, no response from Umbrella AP.
2026-03-15 · Asana
Phase 2 (AED 620K) frozen by CFO recommendation
Yousef Khoury blocks pre-fabrication PO until Phase 1 settled.
2026-03-28 · Today
Jeeves flags as escalation candidate
Pattern: same head-of-prod owns deal, dispute, and silence. Recommend founder-MD intervention.

Suggested actions

Founder-MD direct call

Bypass Sheleesh; Florian to call Umbrella COO directly. Goal: settle AED 108K within 14 days.

Draft talking points
Statutory demand letter

If no response within 7 days post-call, instruct counsel. Recovery probability high (UAE assets).

Use template T-3
Reassign account

Pattern review: Sheleesh shouldn't own a disputed account he sold. Move to Khalil (acct services head).

Open HR ticket
Jeeves Symbolic AED 108K is not why this matters. The pattern matters: ownership concentration, silence under pressure, frozen Phase 2 worth 620K, and AED 22K/wk staff cost still loaded. Resolve in two weeks or write off and book a clean lesson.
Open invoice in Money →

Open in Production →

Monday digest · preview

Sent every Monday 06:00 GST · this week's draft
From: Jeeves <jeeves@corsair-hq.com> To: Florian Becker, Reem Bouhassan, Yousef Khoury Subject: Monday brief · 30 March 2026
Generated 2026-03-30 06:00 GST · ~3 min read · trained on last 27 months

One-line take

Two fires, one breeze, and a champagne dilemma. Aurora Gala bleeding margin while Vision Realm refuses to sign the change order — that is your single largest live risk this quarter. Aldira still ghosting AED 800K. Lantern Bay 2026 sold out; Q1 beat plan by 9.6%.

The numbers

  • Cash unrestricted: AED 9.1M · runway ~98 days · target ≥ 90
  • Q1 revenue: AED 11.51M vs plan AED 10.5M (+9.6%)
  • EBITDA Q1: AED 890K vs plan AED 950K — narrowly missed because of Aurora
  • DSO trailing 90d: 51 days · target 45 · trend improving
  • AR open: AED 3.27M · of which AED 800K is Aldira (47d overdue)
  • Headcount: 18 FTE · payroll 480K/mo · utilisation likely 62% in May

Decisions needed this week

  • Today — Force Aurora Gala change order. Halt fabrication POs until written CO. Florian to call KSA principal before EOD. Margin impact AED 990K.
  • Today — Issue formal demand letter to Aldira Group (AED 800K). Template T-3 in your library. Pause new business with Aldira pending settlement.
  • This week — Decide insurance dispute (Lloyds, AED 1.31M outstanding). Pursue civil suit (NPV +AED 525K, 9–14mo) or write off. Limbo is not a strategy.
  • By 4 April — Renew Bvlgari Marina noise permit before Family K. event on 24 April.
  • This month — Decide on Q2 creative hire. Recommend freeze pending utilisation review.

Wins (for the record)

  • Lantern Bay 2026 sold out three nights · revenue AED 5.81M · GP AED 2.25M
  • Royal Reception (Sheikh G.) closed clean · 100% upfront · cleared 18 January
  • DSO recovering from 78 (Sep '25) to 51 — discipline holding

Calendar — next 14 days

  • 2026-04-01 — Mashreq WPS payroll run (AED 480K)
  • 2026-04-04 — Bvlgari Marina permit deadline
  • 2026-04-11 — Aurora Gala event date (red)
  • 2026-04-15 — Lantern Bay vendor settlement (escrow sweep AED 5.64M)
  • 2026-04-18 — Royal Reception (Qatar) event date
  • 2026-04-24 — Family K. Daughter Engagement event date
  • 2026-04-29 — ADNOC Innovation 2026 payment due (AED 1.82M, Net 90)

Watch list (no action yet)

  • USD AR exposure rising — USD 360K open. Peg holds, but reporting noise.
  • Meraas Bluewaters AR Walk — burn rate +12%, AR vendor stalling. Decision by 10 April.
  • Sheleesh / Umbrella ownership pattern — managerial conversation, not project conversation.

Reply to this email to ask Jeeves a question, or open Corsair to drill in. — J.
